articles.title: Vitalik Buterin Unveils Roadmap for Improving Privacy on Ethereum
articles.description: Ethereum’s co-founder reveals nine steps he’d take to make Ethereum better at protecting user privacy.

articles.title: Will Trump's Solana Meme Coin Pump or Dump After 40 Million Tokens Are Unlocked?
articles.description: Donald Trump’s meme coin is approaching its first token unlock, with the project’s team set to receive around 40 million TRUMP next Friday.

articles.title: Sweden: proposal to include Bitcoin in national reserves
articles.description: A Swedish MP is proposing the adoption of Bitcoin in the country's national foreign exchange reserves.

articles.title: ETH/BTC Collapse Isn’t the End: Analyst Sees Silent Rebuild
articles.description: Ethereum's 77% collapse against Bitcoin hides a quiet technical renaissance that could fuel its long-term revival.

articles.title: Onyxcoin rockets 80% in 24 hours amid Goliath Mainnet launch
articles.description: Decentralized finance (DeFi) protocol Onyx (XCN) has seen its token price surge over 80% in the past 24 hours following the launch of its new Goliath Mainnet. The upgrade marks a shift from Onyx’s existing Layer 3 rollup to a standalone Layer 1 blockchain, with promises of improved scalability, security, and performance.
